# gitlab_group_saved_reply (Resource)

The `gitlab_group_saved_reply` resource manages a comment template (saved reply) shared across a group. Requires Premium or Ultimate.

**Upstream API**: [GitLab GraphQL API docs](https://docs.gitlab.com/api/graphql/reference/#mutationgroupsavedreplycreate)



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `content` (String) The content of the saved reply.
- `group` (String) The ID or full path of the group.
- `name` (String) The name of the saved reply.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The Global ID of the saved reply, e.g. `gid://gitlab/Groups::SavedReply/42`.
